findings.description: The site is served over HTTP without SSL/TLS encryption. All data transmitted between the browser and server is in plaintext and can be intercepted.
findings.solution: Configure your server to use HTTPS. Obtain a free TLS certificate from Let's Encrypt (certbot) and redirect all HTTP traffic to HTTPS.
findings.recommendation: Configure your server to use HTTPS. Obtain a free TLS certificate from Let's Encrypt (certbot) and redirect all HTTP traffic to HTTPS.

findings.description: HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) header is not set. Browsers will not automatically enforce HTTPS connections.
findings.solution: Add Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload to all HTTPS responses.
findings.recommendation: Add Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload to all HTTPS responses.
